title: Buying at 7-Eleven
scene: 你在便利店买早餐和咖啡。

turns.en: Good morning. What can I get you?

turns.cn: 一个三明治和一大杯咖啡。
turns.en: A sandwich and a large coffee, please.

turns.cn: 要加热吗？奶和糖自己加。
turns.en: Want it heated? Cream and sugar are over there.
Yes, please. And a bottle of water.
That'll be nine twenty.
Card, please. Thanks.

turns.cn: 请拿好，祝你有美好的一天。
turns.en: Here you go. Have a great day.

title: ATM at the Store
scene: 便利店里的取款机吞卡了，你向店员求助。

turns.cn: 你好，取款机把我的卡吞了。
turns.en: Hi, the ATM ate my card.

turns.cn: 机器不是我们管的，要打银行电话。
turns.en: We don't manage that machine. You'll need to call your bank.

turns.cn: 银行电话在机器上有吗？
turns.en: Is the bank's number on the machine?
Yes, it's on the side of the machine.
Could I use your phone to call?
Sure, come to the counter.
Thank you so much!

title: Asking for a Product
scene: 你在便利店找某种电池。

turns.en: Do you carry double-A batteries?
Behind the register. How many do you need?
One four-pack is fine.
Four ninety-nine. Need a bag?

turns.cn: 不用，顺便问下附近有药店吗？
turns.en: No thanks. By the way, is there a pharmacy nearby?

turns.cn: 出门右转，两个路口就有。
turns.en: Turn right out the door, two blocks down.
Thanks!

title: Late Night Purchase
scene: 深夜你去便利店买应急用品。

turns.en: Will that be all?

turns.cn: 你们二十四小时营业吗？
turns.en: Are you open twenty-four hours?
Yes, we're open every day.

turns.cn: 那太好了。有充电线吗？iPhone的。
turns.en: Great. Do you have phone chargers? For iPhone.
Yes, on the bottom shelf over there.
I'll take this with the rest.
Sixteen seventy total.

title: ATM at Store
scene: 你在便利店用店内ATM取现金遇到问题。

turns.en: The ATM kept my card. Can you help?

turns.cn: 请稍等，我联系银行热线。
turns.en: One moment. I'll call the bank hotline.

turns.cn: 钱已经扣了但机器没吐钞。
turns.en: The money was deducted but the machine didn't dispense cash.

turns.cn: 记下交易编号，银行会核查。
turns.en: Write down the transaction ID. The bank will investigate.
How long does a refund usually take?

turns.cn: 三到五个工作日，卡会寄给您。
turns.en: Three to five business days. They'll mail your card back.
Okay. Thank you.
